---
title: "Collection of Datasets"
output: html_document
---

*** 
### Overview
I initially developed this collection as part of my Introduction to Applied Statistics Class. A collection of datasets available in R can be found on [that page](smasongarrison.github.io/Class.html).

*** 

### Data Collections
[Harvard Dataverse](https://dataverse.harvard.edu/)
 
[Inter-university Consortium for Political and Social Research (ICPSR)](https://www.icpsr.umich.edu/icpsrweb/landing.jsp)
